name: Void
description: Open-source fork of VS Code, a Cursor alternative that connects directly to LLM providers without a middleman backend.

seo.title: Void — Code Assistants / Agent Tooling
seo.meta_description: Void: Open-source fork of VS Code, a Cursor alternative that connects directly to LLM providers without a middleman backend.

when_to_use: Building with AI coding in a fully open-source VS Code-based IDE
Running AI completions with self-hosted models for full privacy
Contributing to an open-source Cursor alternative with custom AI
Using locally-hosted LLMs for AI-assisted coding without cloud

pros: Open-source Cursor alternative with no middleman backend
Direct LLM provider connections give full control of keys
Based on VS Code so extensions and muscle memory transfer
Privacy advantage since prompts do not hit a vendor backend
cons: Features lag Cursor and Windsurf by a meaningful margin
Requires your own API keys and billing setup
Smaller team and slower release cadence
review.verdict: Promising open-source AI editor if you value privacy and LLM flexibility over polish and features.
review.best_for: Privacy-conscious developers who want to bring their own LLM keys and avoid SaaS middlemen
review.not_for: Users wanting the most polished agent experience or built-in team features
